{{CargoOrgan
|name=Mutant Spider Legs
|type=Common
|rank=orange
|id=10958
|idx=151
|description=Bio-mechanical limbs derived from spider toxin mutations. Superhuman strength with instinctive maneuverability. The pinnacle of bioprosthetics!
|skill=
|hp=1692
|def=194
|atk=282
|rush=200
|gene1=Per Mutant Form Tier, {race} RUSH +35
Mutant Form Tiers: 9/9
|gene2=Wind RES +90
|gene3=Per Mutant Form Tier, {race} ATK +35
Mutant Form Tiers: 9/9
|gene4={race} Wind RES +1.5%
|gene5=Free Gene Speedup (Mutant) +45m
|gene7=Free Gene Speedup (Mutant) +2h 15m (Awakened)
|}}
